content:
My left side body pains might have been future sight. Work fired a ton of people with no notice. Jesus American corporations are brutal. It's quite demoralising. Guess it's a sign that I'm doing an alright job though and my problems are just imposter syndrome. 

Family got up at 4am this morning to go down to the Marae and then Kate and the kids went on the waka. They had an awesome time. Very tiring for them but both really enjoyed it. Probably the highlight of their holidays but I'm sure it will be a life long memory for them. We had to fight very hard to get everyone there but Kate was sick and obviously it was tough for the kids so early. But man. What a beautiful day. 
I didn't go on the waka because it feels like cultural appropriation. Years of minorities people hating the white man got to me I guess. I know it's not something that's directed at me personally and I'm definitely welcome to join but.. yeah that's how I feel about it.
